rules.description: Double tap escape: Switch to profile: Programming Mode

to.shell_command: "/Library/Application Support/org.pqrs/Karabiner-Elements/bin/karabiner_cli" --select-profile "Programming Mode" && osascript -e 'display notification "Programming Mode" with title "Profile Switched"'

manipulators.description: Open -a 'iTerm.app' & switch to profile: Programming Mode

to.shell_command: open -a 'iTerm.app' && "/Library/Application Support/org.pqrs/Karabiner-Elements/bin/karabiner_cli" --select-profile "Programming Mode" && osascript -e 'display notification "Programming Mode" with title "Profile Switched"'

"/Library/Application Support/org.pqrs/Karabiner-Elements/bin/karabiner_cli" --select-profile "Programming Mode" && osascript -e 'display notification "Programming Mode" with title "Profile Switched"'

rules.description: Double tap escape: Switch to profile: Normal Mode

to.shell_command: "/Library/Application Support/org.pqrs/Karabiner-Elements/bin/karabiner_cli" --select-profile "Normal Mode" && osascript -e 'display notification "Normal Mode" with title "Profile Switched"'

osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "/resume"' && osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key code 36' && osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key code 36'
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "/init" & return'
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "/clear" & return'
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "/help" & return'
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "/bug" & return'
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "/plan" & return'
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "/commit" & return'
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "exit" & return'
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "git status" & return'
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "git add ." & return'
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "git commit -m \"\"" ' && osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key code 123'
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "git push" & return'
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "git log --oneline" & return'
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "git diff" & return'
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "git branch" & return'
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "git pull" & return'
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "git stash" & return'
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "git stash pop" & return'
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "nvim ." & return'
